---
title: "Political Risk Yearbook"
page-layout: article
---

# Political Risk Yearbook

## Description

Country risk publication providing political, financial, and economic risk assessments for international business and investment. Supports global strategy and policy research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Government & Public Policy
- **Data/resource type:** Financial & Market Data, Government & International Statistics
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Financial & Market Data, Government & International Statistics

## Links

- [Access resource](https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?url=https://epub.prsgroup.com/customer/pry/)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
